features.name: packed array output port with multi-bit width
features.description: Code should include a module with an output port declared as a packed array of width greater than one (e.g., logic [1:2])

features.name: z constant assignment to packed array
features.description: Code should include an assignment of z constant ('bz) to a packed array port where the z constant width differs from the array width

features.name: mismatched width port connection between modules
features.description: Code should include instantiation of a module where a packed array output port (width > 1) is connected to a single-bit signal in the parent module
